root_text.sn22.38:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ bhagavā etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.38:2.2: ‘katamesaṁ, āvuso ānanda, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha?
root_text.sn22.38:2.3: Katamesaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati?
root_text.sn22.38:2.4: Katamesaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyatī’ti?
root_text.sn22.38:2.5: Evaṁ puṭṭho tvaṁ, ānanda, kinti byākareyyāsī”ti?
root_text.sn22.38:2.7: ‘katamesaṁ, āvuso ānanda, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha?
root_text.sn22.38:2.8: Katamesaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati?
root_text.sn22.38:2.9: Katamesaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyatī’ti?
root_text.sn22.38:2.11: ‘yaṁ kho, āvuso, rūpaṁ atītaṁ niruddhaṁ vipariṇataṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:2.12: tassa uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:2.14: tassā uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitāya aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:2.17: tesaṁ uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:2.19: tassa uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:2.20: Imesaṁ kho, āvuso, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:3.1: Yaṁ kho, āvuso, rūpaṁ ajātaṁ apātubhūtaṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:3.2: tassa uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:3.4: tassā uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitāya aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:3.7: tesaṁ uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:3.9: tassa uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:3.10: Imesaṁ kho, āvuso, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:4.1: Yaṁ kho, āvuso, rūpaṁ jātaṁ pātubhūtaṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:4.2: tassa uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.sn22.38:4.6: tesaṁ uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.sn22.38:4.7: Yaṁ viññāṇaṁ jātaṁ pātubhūtaṁ tassa uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.sn22.38:4.8: Imesaṁ kho, āvuso, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyatī’ti.
root_text.sn22.38:5.2: Yaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpaṁ atītaṁ niruddhaṁ vipariṇataṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:5.3: tassa uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:5.8: tassa uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:5.9: Imesaṁ kho, ānanda, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyittha, vayo paññāyittha, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyittha.
root_text.sn22.38:6.1: Yaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpaṁ ajātaṁ apātubhūtaṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:6.2: tassa uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:6.7: tassa uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:6.8: Imesaṁ kho, ānanda, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyissati, vayo paññāyissati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyissati.
root_text.sn22.38:7.1: Yaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpaṁ jātaṁ pātubhūtaṁ;
root_text.sn22.38:7.2: tassa uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.sn22.38:7.7: tassa uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.sn22.38:7.8: Imesaṁ kho, ānanda, dhammānaṁ uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyatīti.
root_text.sn22.38:7.9: Evaṁ puṭṭho tvaṁ, ānanda, evaṁ byākareyyāsī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.38:1.2: Sitting to one side, the Buddha said to Ānanda:
translation_text.sn22.38:2.1: “Ānanda, suppose they were to ask you:
translation_text.sn22.38:2.2: ‘Reverend Ānanda, what are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident?
translation_text.sn22.38:2.3: What are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident?
translation_text.sn22.38:2.4: What are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting are evident?’
translation_text.sn22.38:2.6: “Sir, suppose they were to ask me:
translation_text.sn22.38:2.7: ‘Reverend Ānanda, what are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident?
translation_text.sn22.38:2.8: What are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident?
translation_text.sn22.38:2.9: What are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting are evident?’
translation_text.sn22.38:2.11: ‘Whatever form has passed, ceased, and perished,
translation_text.sn22.38:2.12: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:2.18: consciousness has passed, ceased, and perished,
translation_text.sn22.38:2.19: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:2.20: These the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:3.1: Whatever form is not yet born, and has not yet appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:3.2: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:3.8: consciousness is not yet born, and has not yet appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:3.9: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:3.10: These are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:4.1: Whatever form has been born, and has appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:4.2: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting is evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:4.7: consciousness has been born, and has appeared, its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting are evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:4.8: These are the things for which arising is evident, vanishing is evident, and change while persisting is evident.’
translation_text.sn22.38:4.9: That’s how I’d answer such a question.”
translation_text.sn22.38:5.2: Whatever form has passed, ceased, and perished,
translation_text.sn22.38:5.3: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:5.7: consciousness has passed, ceased, and perished,
translation_text.sn22.38:5.8: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:5.9: These the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting were evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:6.1: Whatever form is not yet born, and has not yet appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:6.2: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:6.6: consciousness is not yet born, and has not yet appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:6.7: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:6.8: These are the things for which arising, vanishing, and change while persisting will be evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:7.1: Whatever form has been born, and has appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:7.2: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting are evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:7.6: consciousness has been born, and has appeared,
translation_text.sn22.38:7.7: its arising, vanishing, and change while persisting are evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:7.8: These are the things for which arising is evident, vanishing is evident, and change while persisting is evident.
translation_text.sn22.38:7.9: That’s how you should answer such a question.”
